sourcesContent:
export default function DestCard({ pkg, onViewDetails }) { return (
{pkg.badge && {pkg.badge}}
{pkg.name}
{pkg.duration}
{'★'.repeat(Math.floor(pkg.rating))} {pkg.rating} ({pkg.reviews})

{pkg.description}

{pkg.inclusions.map((inc, i) => ( {inc} ))}
Starting from
{pkg.price}
per adult
); }
